---
name: "🐛 Bug Report"
about: Report a broken, hallucinating, or poorly performing prompt
title: "[BUG] <Prompt Name> - <Short Description>"
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

### 🔍 Prompt Name
Which prompt is affected? (e.g., `suggest-fixes`)

### 📝 Description of the Issue
A clear and concise description of what is wrong with the prompt's behavior.

### 🧪 Steps to Reproduce
1. The input (`{{args}}`) you provided to the prompt.
2. The AI model you were using (e.g., Gemini 1.5 Pro, Claude 3.5 Sonnet).
3. The unexpected output received.

### ✅ Expected Behavior
What did you expect the prompt to produce instead?

### ❌ Actual Behavior
What did the prompt actually produce? (Screenshots or logs are helpful).

### 🛠️ Possible Fix (Optional)
If you have a suggestion on how to improve the instructions in the `.toml` file, please provide it here.
